scripts.web:seed: npm exec -- wrangler --config web/worker/wrangler.toml r2 bucket create fin-agent --local; npm exec -- wrangler --config web/worker/wrangler.toml r2 object put fin-agent/series/VOO.json --file data/series.VOO.json --local; npm exec -- wrangler --config web/worker/wrangler.toml r2 object put fin-agent/holdings/VOO.json --file data/holdings.VOO.json --local
